description: No online presence found. Small EPRA-licensed electrical contractor based in Machakos.

Kenyan subsidiary of French renewable energy company Voltalia. Multi-source electricity producer (wind, solar, hydropower, biomass). Developing the Kopere Solar Power Station in Kenya with a 20-year PPA with Kenya Power.
Red Falco Trading Enterprise Limited. Kenyan trading company appearing in import/export records. EPRA-licensed electrical contractor. No dedicated website found.
Established in 2016, Widen Engineering Services Limited has grown into a dynamic and trusted name in the Kenyan construction and infrastructure industry. EPRA-licensed electrical contractor.

Echo Four Company Ltd specializes in civil construction including road/cyclist/pedestrian bridges, wind farm foundations, water tanks, silos, dam strengthening, heavy lifting, and bridge maintenance. Also listed as solar contractor. Based in Mombasa.

EPRA-licensed electrical contractor based in Thika. Listed on the EPRA register. No dedicated website or online presence found. Name resembles German Flottweg but appears to be an independent Kenyan entity.
Powercon Engineering specializes in SCADA and Process Automation solutions for industrial and utility clientele. Also provides Natural Gas, Biogas, Hydrogen, and Diesel generators from Europe.

Volkslift East Africa provides high-quality elevators, escalators, and moving walkways across Kenya and East Africa using advanced German technologies. Founded 2017. Products include passenger, panoramic, home, hospital, freight, and car elevators.
Dampa Company Limited. EPRA-licensed electrical contractor based in Uasin Gishu (Eldoret). No dedicated website found. Appears in EPRA register.

Gransol Africa Limited, incorporated March 2018, offers supply, installation, commissioning and maintenance of power equipment. Also involved in telecommunications. Headquartered at Block B, Mombasa Road, Repen Complex, Nairobi.

Marryat & Scott (Kenya) Ltd. Integrates elevators and escalators into buildings, provides repair and maintenance services. Historically part of UK-based Marryat & Scott, acquired by Kone in 2014. Tel: 020 445 4345/46/47. P.O. Box 41518-00100, Nairobi.
Padan Investments Limited. EPRA-licensed Class C-2 electrical contractor in Nairobi. Also registered as NCA6 electrical engineering service contractor. No dedicated website found.
Beevas Electrical Power and Contractors. EPRA-licensed Class C-1 electrical contractor based in Kerugoya, Kirinyaga County. No online presence found.

Alan Dick & Company (East Africa) Limited. Leading telecoms infrastructure provider in Eastern Africa. Offers site survey/design, technical engineering, radio solutions, turnkey site build and construction for cellular networks. Licensed by CCK. Serves Kenya, Tanzania, Rwanda, Burundi, Uganda, Sudan.

Eenovators Limited is an Energy Service Company (ESCO) based in Kenya, providing innovative clean energy management solutions. Specializes in hybrid solar PV systems, energy auditing, and energy efficiency. P.O. Box 50583-00200, Nairobi.

Dmesh Electricals Ltd. EPRA-licensed electrical contractor specializing in electricals, instrumentation & control, maintenance and troubleshooting. P.O. Box 2432-00606 Sarit Centre. Managing Director: Patrick Wahome. Also on Twitter @LtdDmesh.
Acrux Engineers / Acrux Engineering Solution. EPRA-licensed Class B electrical contractor based in Ruai, Nairobi. Website indicates project-focused engineering services.
Parabat Electrical Services Limited. EPRA-licensed Class B electrical contractor in Nairobi. Staff includes professionals from Strathmore University. No dedicated website found.
Maranga Electricals and Contractors. EPRA-licensed Class C-2 electrical contractor based in Eldoret. Licensed electrician: Moses Ooko Obat (EPRA/EW/04084). No online presence found.

Benris Investments LTD. EPRA-licensed Class A-1 electrical contractor in Nairobi. P.O. Box 3867-00100. Active in imports (timber/wood products). Has government procurement history with Ministry of Lands.
